text.p: I am , PhD, a Professor of English and Applied Linguistics in the Department of English, University, , Nigeria.

I wish to request your kind assistance to support my application for a DAAD=A0 Post-doctoral scholarship for 3 months, from XXX, to enable me research further into, write and share knowledge on the topic of my inaugural lecture, which I intend to present by the end of in my home institution .
I shall be grateful if you could, please, serve as my host professor and also help to process a letter of invitation from your university during the period of my stay in Germany.

I have chosen you along with two other professors as my potential host after due consideration of your pedigree as a renowned scholar of Applied linguistics and your sustained interest in English language studies in native and non-native contexts. Although my research will be largely independent, I shall undoubtedly benefit from useful comments and ideas from other experts in the field, to enhance the quality of the project.
Advanced Information on the project is provided thus:
Title of Proposal: English Language Usage, Use and Misuse in a Non-host Second Language Context, Nigeria

Objectives: a. Review the current state of English in Nigeria as presented in existing studies; b. Analyse and describe data on English usage and micro- and macro-uses in Nigeria with respect to the prospects and problems; and c. Determine the extent and limits of the status of English vis-a-vis other languages in Nigeria for achieving sustainable national development
Methodology: Report from empirical studies, natural observation, interviews and questionnaire
1.Nigerian English as an Institutionalized ESL Variety of English
2.Aspects of English Language Studies in Nigeria
3.Uses and Misuses (Micro-and Macro-) of the English language in Nigeria
4.Re-positioning the English Language and other languages in Nigeria forsustainable national development and global relevance

I am already writing the study proposal for the application and shall send it to you for your input when I finish. I have attached my CV to this request to familiarize you with my academic and professional activities to date.
